title: In the Court of the Crimson King: King Crimson at 50
original_title: In the Court of the Crimson King: King Crimson at 50
overview: The film explores the “acute suffering” and transcendent glory experienced by current and former members of King Crimson, allowing the audience an intimate and sometimes uncomfortable insight into the musicians’ experience as they confront life and death head on in the world’s most demanding rock band.
